description_long: This object consists of two distinct helmets placed side by side, each with a dome-shaped top and a prominent T-shaped visor on the front. The left helmet is olive green with a maroon faceplate, tan side panels, and a vertical rangefinder attachment on the right side. The right helmet is metallic gray with blue faceplate accents and a similar rangefinder on the left. Both helmets have smooth, hard surfaces with subtle weathering and panel details, and the visors are opaque and dark. The rear of each helmet features vertical ridges and a slightly raised central strip, while the rangefinder stalks are thin and rectangular. These helmets evoke a science fiction or futuristic aesthetic, with bold color blocking and functional design elements.
description: A pair of sci-fi helmets with dome tops, T-shaped visors, and side-mounted rangefinders, featuring olive green/maroon and gray/blue color schemes.
description_view_0: Front view showing both helmets' T-shaped visors, color-blocked faceplates, and rangefinder attachments.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the dome shapes, rangefinder stalks, and the smooth, metallic surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the helmets' vertical ridges, raised central strips, and the back color panels.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the rangefinder mechanisms and the contrasting back panel colors.
attribute_graphic_design: Color-blocked design with solid panels in olive green, maroon, tan, gray, and blue; no additional graphics or motifs.
